_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: the whole-genome scan identified 2 significant genes after p-value adjustment, whereas SKAT-O identified only FBN1
details: Identified 2 significant genes (FBN1, COL5A1) for Marfan syndrome after p-value adjustment, while SKAT-O identified only FBN1
